notes: DuckDB write path wired into 11 tools. Added 2 new tables (EXECUTION_TABLE, FEEDBACK_TABLE) to schema. All writes are best-effort via Effect.ignore, gated on OPENCODE_DUCKDB_PATH env var. SQL escaping via single-quote doubling. Typecheck/test could not be executed due to bash restriction on 'bun' commands, but all imports and references verified clean via rg.
